page.title: Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '[[Category:Wikipedia articles needing translation]]'
revision.text: [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing translation]]
[[Category:Wikipedia articles needing translation| ]]

The majority of articles needing translation will be found in the appropriate language sub-categories, or FA sub categories. Those for Wikipedias which do not have a subcategory are listed here.
[[Category:Wikipedia articles needing translation| ]]

revision.comment: Backlog
added {{Polluted category}} using [[Project:AWB|AWB]] (9244)
+Wikipedia category
added [[Category:Wikipedia translation]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
Not THAT much of a backlog
Undid revision 762433195 by [[Special:Contributions/Fixuture|Fixuture]] ([[User talk:Fixuture|talk]]) Redundant category
sub-categories and sub categories and subcategories oh my
Add random subcategory button
11 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:Articles_needing_translation_from_foreign-language_Wikipedias]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (222 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing translation]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 4 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8267751)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8267751)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Wikipedia category}}
{{polluted category}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category|text=Browse a random subcategory of this one}}}}'''}}|style=margin:1em}}
{{wikidata link|Q8267751}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]]
[[en:Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

<!--templates-->
{{Wikipedia category}}
{{polluted category}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category|text=Browse a random subcategory of this one}}}}'''}}|style=margin:1em}}
{{wikidata link|Q8267751}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]]
[[en:Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates-->

{{polluted category}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category|text=Browse a random subcategory of this one}}}}'''}}|style=margin:1em}}
{{wikidata link|Q8267751}}
<!--interwikis-->

[[en:Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]]

{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category|text=Browse a random subcategory of this one}}}}'''}}|style=margin:1em}}
{{wikidata link|Q8267751}}
<!--interwikis-->

[[en:Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs); add 18 sitelink pair(s) from Wikidata; check_date=2026-05-09 [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25595991611|time triggered pipeline]]
